input.pr_body:
Ensures that `ChangedSerde`,  `SubscriptionWrapperSerde` and
`ValueAndTimestampSerde` forward headers to their underlying serdes.

Reviewers: Matthias J. Sax <matthias@confluent.io>

Ensures that `CombinedKeySchema`,  FK-join processors, and global-store
processor, forward headers to their underlying serdes.

Reviewers: Matthias J. Sax <matthias@confluent.io>

This PR ensures headers are propagated in
`SubscriptionResponseWrapperSerde`,
`LeftOrRightValueSerializer/Deserializer` and
`TimestampedKeyAndJoinSideSerializer/Deserializer`  Added unit tests to
check headers propagation.

Reviewers: Murali Basani <muralidhar.basani@aiven.io>, Alieh Saeedi
 <asaeedi@confluent.io>, Matthias J. Sax <matthias@confluent.io>

We are removing some of the previously added public APIs until KIP-939
is ready to use.  Similar to the [4.1
PR](https://github.com/apache/kafka/pull/19985)

Reviewers: Justine Olshan <jolshan@confluent.io>, Artem Livshits
 <alivshits@confluent.io>

ground_truth.known_issues: PR was reverted — agent should identify the problematic change.
